steps.title: Compare Chang'e five with Apollo
steps.content: The claim asks why the Chang'e 5 samples are significant compared with samples from Apollo missions. The completion must identify a meaningful difference supported by the table.

steps.title: Reject unsupported comparisons
steps.content:
• Choice B claims the same landing site as Apollo 11, which the data do not support.
  • Choice C says the closest age match is Apollo 17, which does not fit the age comparison.
  • Choice D introduces predicted ages, which the question does not support.

steps.title: Choose the age difference
steps.content: The supported significance is that the Chang'e 5 samples are much younger than those from any Apollo mission. The answer is A.
